meta.title: The Big Golf Search-and-Find Book
meta.description: This colorful golf-themed “Where’s What?” book introduces children to the best aspects of the sport. Funny stories, lovable characters, and vibrant illustrations turn the sport into a real adventure for little ones.

hero.title: The Big Golf Search-and-Find Book
hero.description: The individual merchandise for your club

preface.text: How do you introduce preschoolers to the world of golf? With colorful search-and-find books! Funny stories, lovable characters, and vibrant illustrations turn the sport into a real adventure for little ones.

summary.title: The book at a glance
items: Individually tailored to your club and sponsors
Large format (260 x 375 mm, similar to A3)

content.title: Why a Search-and-Find Book?
content.description: The Search-and-Find book introduces children to the best aspects of the sport. Funny stories, lovable characters, and vibrant illustrations turn the sport into a real adventure for little ones.

content.title: A Book, Many Possibilities
content.description: Whether as merchandise in the club shop, as a heartfelt welcome gift for new members and guests, or as a fun time-waster in pediatric practices – the Search-and-Find book is a versatile showcase for the club and the sport. And the best: The proceeds from the sale can directly flow into youth work and promote the next generation.

content.title: Customized for your Club
content.description: Your hand-drawn club house or a distinctive feature of your location adorns the title page. Your sponsors can immortalize themselves on the back and actively support the project.
